name: Password Manager Codespace
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'if ! command -v mysql >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y mariadb-client && sudo ln -sf /usr/bin/mariadb /usr/local/bin/mysql; fi'
postStartCommand: bash -lc 'if ! command -v mysql >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y mariadb-client && sudo ln -sf /usr/bin/mariadb /usr/local/bin/mysql; fi'
